title: Rock Layers
description: An extreme close-up of a weathered rock face, the camera panning slowly across it. A fractal-noise height field is lit as a true 3D bump, with subtle irregular striations (bedding domain-warped so it never reads as regular waves), fracture cracks, and hard beds that jut out as shadow-casting ledges. Bed thickness, warping, surface relief, cracks, ledges, pan speed, vertical drift and light warmth are live and mappable.
